mapper.insert: INSERT INTO reservation (user_id, space_id, plate_number, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{spaceId}, #{plateNumber}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE reservation SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT r.*, s.space_number as spaceNumber FROM reservation r LEFT JOIN parking_space s ON r.space_id = s.id WHERE r.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY r.reserve_time DESC
SELECT * FROM reservation WHERE space_id = #{spaceId} AND status = 0
